Name: Active Users YoY %
Expression:
DIVIDE(
    [Total Active Users Current Year] - [Total Active Users Previous Year],
    [Total Active Users Previous Year]
)

Name: Active Users YoY % Formatted
Expression:
VAR YoY_Value = [Active Users YoY %]
VAR LatestYear = MAX('Calendar'[Year])
VAR YearBefore = LatestYear - 1

VAR HistoryExists = 
    CALCULATE(
        COUNTROWS('Data GA4'), 
        'Calendar'[Year] = YearBefore
    ) > 0

VAR Threshold = 0.0005 

VAR Arrow = 
    SWITCH( TRUE(),
        YoY_Value >= Threshold, UNICHAR(9650),  -- (▲)
        YoY_Value <= -Threshold, UNICHAR(9660), -- (▼)
        BLANK()
    )

RETURN
IF(
    HistoryExists, 
    Arrow & " " & FORMAT(YoY_Value, "0.0%;0.0%;0.0%"),
    " "
)

Name: Axis_Max_Buffer_Active_Users_Channel
Expression:
MAXX(
    ALLSELECTED('Data GA4'[channel_group]), 
    [Total Active Users Current Year]
) * 1.7

Name: Axis_Max_Buffer_Active_Users_Device
Expression:
MAXX(
    ALLSELECTED('Data GA4'[device]), 
    [Total Active Users Current Year]
) * 1.7

Name: Axis_Max_Buffer_Active_Users_Line
Expression:
VAR MaxValueCY = MAXX(ALLSELECTED('Calendar'[Month]), [Total Active Users Current Year])
VAR MaxValuePY = MAXX(ALLSELECTED('Calendar'[Month]), [Total Active Users Previous Year])
VAR OverallMax = MAX(MaxValueCY, MaxValuePY)

RETURN 
    OverallMax * 1.1

RETURN

Name: Engaged Sessions YoY %

    [Total Engaged Sessions Current Year] - [Total Engaged Sessions Previous Year],
    [Total Engaged Sessions Previous Year]
)

Name: Engaged Sessions YoY % Formatted
Expression:
VAR YoY_Value = [Engaged Sessions YoY %]
VAR Arrow = 
    IF(
        YoY_Value > 0, 
        UNICHAR(9650), -- arrow up ▲
        IF(
            YoY_Value < 0, 
            UNICHAR(9660), -- arrow down ▼
            "–" -- neutral
        )
    )
RETURN
    Arrow & " " & FORMAT(YoY_Value, "0.0%;0.0%;0.0%")

Name: Legend Name Current Year

Name: Legend Name Previous Year
Expression:
VAR SelYear = SELECTEDVALUE('Calendar'[Year])
VAR PrevYear = SelYear - 1
VAR HistoryExist = 
    CALCULATE(
        COUNTROWS('Data GA4'), 
        'Calendar'[Year] = PrevYear
    ) > 0

RETURN 
IF(
    HistoryExist,
    "● " & FORMAT(PrevYear, "0"),
    " "
)

Name: Subtitle_Year_vs_PrevYear
Expression:
VAR LatestYear = MAX('Calendar'[Year])
VAR YearBefore = LatestYear - 1
VAR SelectedMonth = SELECTEDVALUE('Calendar'[Month])

VAR HistoryExists = 
    CALCULATE(
        COUNTROWS('Data GA4'), 
        'Calendar'[Year] = YearBefore
    ) > 0

RETURN
IF(
    HistoryExists,
    IF(
        ISFILTERED('Calendar'[Month]) && NOT(ISBLANK(SelectedMonth)),
        SelectedMonth & " " & FORMAT(LatestYear,"0") & " vs. " & SelectedMonth & " " & FORMAT(YearBefore,"0"),
        FORMAT(LatestYear,"0") & " vs. " & FORMAT(YearBefore,"0")
    ),
    " "
)

Name: Title_KPI_Universal
Expression:

VAR YearBefore = LatestYear - 1
VAR SelectedMonth = SELECTEDVALUE('Calendar'[Month])

VAR HistoryExists = 
    CALCULATE(
        COUNTROWS('Data GA4'), 
        'Calendar'[Year] = YearBefore
    ) > 0

RETURN
IF(
    HistoryExists, 
    IF(
        ISFILTERED('Calendar'[Month]) && NOT(ISBLANK(SelectedMonth)), 
        "vs. " & SelectedMonth & " " & FORMAT(YearBefore,"0"),
        "vs. " & FORMAT(YearBefore,"0")
    ),
    " "
)
